baseline.purpose: Single executable legacy FamilyOS baseline applied before the production migration chain.
baseline.historicalFileTreatment: Fully redundant after schema.sql; retain for history but do not execute.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Aligns legacy ownership columns and policies before the canonical household foundation.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Catalog preflights and conditional backfills avoid requiring existing rows; historical bootstrap UUID is deterministic, not a credential.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Creates the canonical household, profile, preference, bootstrap-trigger, RLS, and ownership model.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Conditional DDL, guarded backfills, and empty-auth handling support a blank project.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds household-scoped Calendar connection metadata and policies.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL; no row backfill.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds household invitations and invitation RPCs.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive table, function, index, trigger, grant, and policy creation.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds household-scoped Life lists and list items.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL; no data dependency.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds shopping lists, categories, pantry items, and shopping items.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL; no data dependency.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds recipes and meal-planning records integrated with household shopping.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL; foreign keys target approved earlier tables.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Creates the canonical text-keyed Pool action audit table required by the Pool assistant migration.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS preserves the canonical text reading relationship.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds Pool care assistant fields, ownership, policies, and operational indexes.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Conditional columns and empty-table-safe backfills.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds Pool profiles and operational context fields.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL with safe defaults.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Normalizes optional Pool observation fields to nullable text.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Type/nullability changes preserve empty tables and existing text values.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Idempotently reconciles missed Pool context columns and canonical constraints.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Catalog-driven conditional reconciliation and safe defaults.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds habits, routines, notification state, and Pool maintenance completion history/RPC.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL and no mandatory row backfill.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds smart-planning metadata and completion indexes to daily operations.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Conditional column/index additions with defaults.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds proactive brief schedules/history, notification preferences, and routine templates.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL and conflict-safe built-in template setup.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds structured habit actions and daily action history.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional DDL and no row dependency.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds home assets/history and family-intelligence metadata to existing modules.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Conditional columns/tables and no required existing rows.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds unified household activity, attachments, search indexes, and private Storage policies.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive DDL and conflict-safe private bucket creation; requires standard Supabase Storage schema.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds core-experience metadata and completion-status constraints/indexes.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: New columns have defaults; replacement constraints accept the canonical states.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds routine lifecycle status and archives compatibility.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Defaults and guarded status backfill are empty-table safe.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds Relationship OS relationships, goals, activities, indexes, triggers, RLS, and household policies.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Additive conditional tables/indexes with no data backfill.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Revokes anonymous Relationship OS table access and grants authenticated CRUD.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Privilege-only hardening against tables created by the preceding migration.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds household/user-scoped AI preferences, recommendations, proposed-action audits, and feedback.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Transactional additive DDL, no backfill, explicit RLS, authenticated grants, and anonymous/public revocation.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds transparent recommendation metadata and household-scoped recommendation lifecycle history.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Transactional additive columns and table, no backfill, explicit RLS, authenticated grants, and anonymous/public revocation.

approvedMigrations.purpose: Adds household-local recommendation feedback, effectiveness, explainable learning, dependencies, and lifecycle states.
approvedMigrations.blankDatabaseSafeguards: Transactional additive tables and constraint extension, no backfill, explicit RLS, authenticated grants, and anonymous/public revocation.

historyOnlyMigrations.reason: schema.sql contains the same extension, legacy tables, ownership indexes, authenticated grants, RLS enablement, and user policies, plus the later canonical Pool columns. Executing both would duplicate the baseline model.
Repository planning records explicitly mark this as a local-only draft. The production-ready 0.6C household foundation replaces its overlapping household/profile/membership/bootstrap model.

excludedFiles.reason: Retained as historical migration version 20260626000000 but not executed after the authoritative schema.sql baseline.
Replaced by the production-ready 20260701010000 Release 0.6C household foundation and retained only for historical ledger alignment.
Manual legacy ownership repair for populated environments; unnecessary and unsafe for a blank project.
Optional development data is separately invoked and must never run during schema initialization.
